positions.reasoning: Explosive 30.6% revenue growth with improving margins and forward P/E compression to 58 indicates strong earnings momentum. Recent price consolidation provides attractive entry point for 8-22% upside potential.

NVDA's fundamental case remains elite with 73% revenue growth against a 18x forward P/E and a $268 analyst target implying 32% upside, justifying a position in a bull regime despite stretched technicals. RSI at 91.2 warrants a partial entry rather than full Kelly sizing, with the expectation of adding on any pullback toward the MA50 near $185.

positions.reasoning: TSM offers a rare combination of monopoly-grade AI infrastructure exposure, 35% revenue growth, and 46.5% margins at a sub-20x forward P/E — fundamentally cheap for the asset quality. Bull regime with bullish MACD and analyst strong-buy consensus supports a medium-term position, with a breakout above $390 acting as confirmation of the next leg higher.
positions.key_risk: A sudden escalation in U.S.-Taiwan geopolitical tensions or cross-strait rhetoric could gap the stock 15-20% lower overnight, rendering technicals and fundamentals temporarily irrelevant.

positions.reasoning: CRWD is rebounding with strong short-term momentum, trading above the 50-MA with bullish MACD and analyst consensus pointing to ~10.6% upside toward $490; the BULL regime supports entry at this score threshold under full Kelly sizing.
